basics.name: Ajay Gupta
basics.title: Software Developer Engineer @ Jio Platforms Limited
basics.summary: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications using Angular, React, TypeScript, and RxJS. Skilled in developing component-driven architectures, microfrontend systems, and module federation based applications. Experienced in integrating REST APIs, implementing state management with NgRx, and optimizing UI performance for enterprise-scale platforms. Proven ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile environments, deliver production-ready features, and improve system maintainability through reusable frontend architecture.

bullets: Developed scalable enterprise web applications using Angular, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and RxJS.
Designed and implemented modular UI components and reusable frontend libraries, improving development speed and consistency across multiple modules.
Implemented Microfrontend architecture using Module Federation, enabling independent deployment of frontend repositories and improving application scalability.
Integrated RESTful APIs and Strapi CMS collections to manage dynamic data and business workflows.
Built responsive and user-friendly interfaces ensuring cross-browser compatibility and optimized performance.
Collaborated with DevOps teams to configure CI/CD pipelines, enabling automated builds and multi-environment deployments.
Conducted code reviews and debugging sessions to maintain code quality and improve application reliability.
Led development tasks for multiple frontend modules and mentored junior developers during onboarding and project execution.
Worked closely with product managers, backend engineers, and QA teams to deliver high-quality software aligned with business requirements.
Delivered weekly sprint updates and tracked development milestones in Agile development cycles.

projects.title: JioCX
bullets: Currently working at Jio CX, focusing on developing a Cpass tool.
This tool enables businesses to execute voice call marketing campaigns, delivering promotional offers, product updates, and exclusive deals directly to their customers.

projects.title: People First
bullets: This project helps professionals manage team tasks, track project progress, and improve transparency within the organization
People First is based on Reliance's employee management system.

projects.title: JioFace
bullets: JioFace, a Face Recognition attendance system.
leverages REST APIs for seamless integration, utilizes Strapi collections for efficient data management, and implements module federation for enhanced scalability and flexibility.
